caption: A news broadcast features a scene of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, wearing a light-colored garment, standing behind a podium and pressing his hands together in a namaste gesture. He is positioned against a dark backdrop with blurred figures behind him. The screen is filled with various news graphics, including portraits of political figures such as Nitish Kumar and Dr. Prem Kumar. A red ticker at the bottom reads "PM मोदी ने हीट कर नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी" and displays the time "10:09 PM". In the upper right, a "NEWS 18" logo is visible. As the sequence progresses, the visuals transition from a shot of Modi to a graphic overlay featuring Nitish Kumar and another man, with bold white text stating "नीतीश हिट लालू फ्लॉप!". A woman in a yellow suit appears in a small inset window, reporting on the situation. The overall layout remains consistent with news channel branding and scrolling headlines.
